x-enumeration-literals.name: Charge Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description: Calculates amounts due based on fees, interest, usage, subscriptions, or contractual terms.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Invoice Generation
x-enumeration-literals.description: Calculates amounts due based on fees, interest, usage, subscriptions, or contractual terms.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Aggregation of Charges
x-enumeration-literals.description: Consolidates multiple charges (fees, transactions, penalties) into a single bill or statement.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Scheduling & Cycles
x-enumeration-literals.description: Supports billing cycles (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annually).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Adjustment & Correction Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Handles billing adjustments, reversals, or corrections when errors occur.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Notification & Delivery Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Sends billing information to customers via statements, emails, or digital banking channels.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Intergration with Payment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Works with payment or repayment services to facilitate settlement of billed amounts.
